message:
feat(rust): add stochastic_block_model generator binding and improve durability test assertion

Add native Rust stochastic_block_model PyO3 binding in fnx-python/generators.rs
with input validation (sizes/p matrix match, square matrix, probability range,
symmetry) and registration in the module. Also replace .unwrap() with
.expect() in fnx-durability test for clearer failure messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
